methodology_labels.completed_trade_overlay_estimate: Diagnostic adjustment to completed baseline trades; not candidate evidence.
methodology_labels.deferred_requires_rejected_signal_replay: Needs rejected-signal replay before truthful testing.
methodology_labels.lookahead_diagnostic_proxy: Uses information unavailable at decision time; never candidate evidence.
methodology_labels.reporting_only_attribution: Explains observed baseline trades without changing decisions.
methodology_labels.true_forward_replay: Chronological replay over candles with position occupancy, fills, dynamic equity, fees, and slippage.
